backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for GharKharcha, managing expense CRUD and user settings with sample data generation utilities for predefined categories and months.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (mobile-first SPA styling, bottom nav, dashboard, FAB, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing a single summary entry describing App.tsx as the main application component orchestrating tabs, global state, and context providers.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GharKharcha React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component managing active tab, expense modal, PIN lock, dark mode, and routing between Dashboard, CalendarView, Analysis, Reports, and SettingsView tabs.
frontend/src/components/Analysis.tsx: Analysis tab component rendering monthly and yearly expense breakdowns with Recharts pie and bar charts, budget progress, and month/year navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar component with five tabs (Home, Calendar, Analysis, Reports, Settings) that highlights the active tab in accent green.
frontend/src/components/CalendarView.tsx: Renders a monthly calendar grid showing daily expense totals, with navigation between months and a detail panel listing expenses for a selected date including edit and delete actions.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDialog.ts: A reusable confirmation dialog built on shadcn AlertDialog that prompts the user with a title, description, and configurable confirm/cancel buttons.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard screen displaying today's spending, monthly totals, budget progress, a pie chart by category, recent transactions, and AI-generated insights with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ExpenseModal.tsx: A bottom-sheet modal form for adding or editing an expense, with fields for amount, category, date, payment mode, and notes, wired to add/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/PINLock.tsx: A full-screen PIN entry lock screen with a numeric keypad that validates a 4-digit PIN and calls onUnlock on success or shows an error on failure.
frontend/src/components/Reports.tsx: A reports screen that filters expenses by date range, category, and payment mode, displays the filtered list with totals, and supports CSV download, clipboard share, and print export.
frontend/src/components/SettingsView.tsx: React component for the app settings screen, allowing users to configure monthly budget, annual income, dark mode, PIN lock, and clear all expense data.
frontend/src/components/Toast.tsx: Provides a ToastContext with a `showToast` function and renders auto-dismissing toast notifications (success, error, info) at the top of the screen.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating expenses and settings against the ICP backend actor, including add, update, delete, and settings update operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for the GharKharcha color system in light and dark modes, and declares utility animations for tabs, bottom sheets, and toasts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/analytics.ts: Utility functions for filtering, grouping, and aggregating expense data by date, category, day, and month, plus helpers for generating pie and bar chart datasets.
frontend/src/utils/categoryConfig.ts: Defines the list of expense categories with their emoji, color, and background color, along with payment modes, chart colors, and a lookup helper `getCategoryConfig`.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Provides utilities to export expense data as CSV (generate and trigger download) and as a formatted plain-text summary, plus a clipboard copy helper.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Collection of formatting helpers for Indian Rupee currency, dates (DD MMM YYYY), month strings/labels, and miscellaneous utilities like UUID generation and days-in-month calculation.
frontend/src/utils/insightGenerator.ts: Generates an array of contextual spending insights (budget alerts, top category, month-over-month comparisons, per-category changes) by comparing current and previous month expenses against user settings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the GharKharcha app, extending the theme with custom brand colors (gk tokens), border radii, box shadows, fonts, chart palette, sidebar tokens, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version, architecture notes, known issues, and implemented features) for the GharKharcha React SPA expense tracker targeting Indian families.
